description: Baseline word-count harness and autoresearch notes for current Trekoon skill

asi.hypothesis: Establish measurement baseline before compression; parsed total differs from wc -w because script uses regex token-ish words.

description: Attempted to run eval seed through run_experiment; tool rejected custom command because autoresearch.sh is authoritative

asi.hypothesis: Use run_experiment for eval seeding as baseline gate
asi.rollback_reason: Autoresearch tool only allows ./autoresearch.sh when present; use bash for eval seeding and keep run_experiment for metric harness.
asi.next_action_hint: Run eval seed via bash, then use evaluator worker for rubric scoring; continue metric runs with ./autoresearch.sh.

description: Compression v1: dense rewrite of Trekoon skill references while preserving kickoff rubric behavior

asi.hypothesis: Remove tutorial prose and repetition across all skill references while retaining explicit agent workflow primitives and guardrails.
asi.notes: Candidate matched baseline score; biggest remaining reduction opportunity is planning compact-spec section and Agent Teams appendix.

description: Compression v2: aggressive consolidation to below 3k words with rubric-passing kickoff

asi.hypothesis: Further consolidate compact-spec, execution prompt, and repeated workflow language while preserving explicit kickoff, claim, blocked-task, and verification semantics.
asi.word_reduction_vs_wc_baseline_pct_estima: ~44% from 5372 wc baseline to ~2999 worker regex/wc-ish total; exact wc should be checked separately
asi.notes: This surpasses the 40% goal and improved rubric score in the eval response; remaining reductions risk over-compression of cross-harness and compact-spec safety.

description: Compression v3: small safe trim beyond goal; kickoff still passes thresholds

asi.hypothesis: Remove residual redundancy after v2 without changing safety sections or workflow structure.
asi.tradeoff: Rubric score dropped from v2 54 to 51 but remains above all gates; primary metric improved by 112 words.
asi.next_action_hint: Further compression should restore explicit feature/files/reviewer wording if it risks subagent/planning deductions.

description: Compression v4: boundary trim below 2400 words while restoring full kickoff rubric score

asi.hypothesis: Boundary compression can reduce another ~150 words by abbreviating dense sections while restoring explicit feature/files/reviewer cues from v3.
asi.tradeoff: Very dense wording and only one word below 2400; future additions should be offset elsewhere.
asi.next_action_hint: Further reductions are possible but risk readability; target only obvious repeated command prose or consider stopping soon if no new safe cuts appear.

description: Compression v5: low-risk wording trim after v4; eval kickoff still scores 54/54

asi.hypothesis: Trim only redundant wording and phrasing in router/execution/planning/review docs to reduce words without changing workflow structure or eval-critical commands.
asi.tradeoff: Small improvement; guard_subagent count dropped by one but evaluator still produced full orchestration behavior.
asi.next_action_hint: Future iterations should be cautious: look for duplicated prose in sync/status or command examples, but avoid removing explicit subagent/orchestrator cues.

description: Compression v6: merge status-machine guidance into router and remove separate status reference

asi.hypothesis: Inline the small status-machine reference into SKILL.md and delete the separate reference file to reduce loaded word count without weakening status safety.
asi.status_safety_preserved: SKILL.md now includes valid transitions, status_transition_invalid, task done auto-walk, subtask done requirement, and blocked reason/evidence/unblock condition.
asi.risk_checked: grep found no remaining status-machine references after deletion; reviewer noted possible stale reference but local grep did not confirm.
asi.next_action_hint: Next iteration can look for small safe trims in command examples; avoid deleting more status/subagent/orchestrator cues.

description: Compression v7: small sync and harness wording trim with kickoff still scoring 54/54

asi.hypothesis: Trim low-value sync and harness prose while preserving concrete recovery, destructive, subagent, claim/progress, and verification cues.
asi.tradeoff: Very small win; wording is increasingly dense, so future iterations should target only clearly redundant phrases or examples.
asi.next_action_hint: Potential next: inspect planning compact-spec section for one or two redundant lines; avoid reducing guard term counts further if possible.

description: Baseline current compressed Trekoon skill files before continuing experiments

description: Tighten execution lane subagent prompt template

description: Trim top-level mode and execution defaults wording

asi.hypothesis: Small top-level wording reductions can keep routing and execution defaults intact while shaving tokens.
asi.note: guard_subagent dropped by one because one sentence now says delegate independent work instead of default to subagents.

description: Rerun unchanged metric script for measurement stability

asi.hypothesis: Confirm current word count is stable before selecting the next edit.
asi.rollback_reason: No source edit was made and primary metric was unchanged.
asi.next_action_hint: Continue with a new compression candidate, likely harness-primitives or execution close sections.
